libOverrides.source-kit.mjs: NotificationItem.tsx value-imports a real Next.js server action (marcarNotificacaoLida) that transitively pulls in @prisma/client + mariadb driver; upstream only applies componentSrcMap:null to the post-hoc component list, not the synth entry file list, so the excluded file still broke the bundle. Fork excludes componentSrcMap:null files at entry-synthesis time too. Also disambiguates same-name export collisions across files (see DeleteButton in NOTES.md) and injects the MockRouterProvider export into the synth entry directly, since cfg.extraEntries' workspaceRoot bound is broken by the external --node-modules staging this repo requires (see NOTES.md).
libOverrides.bundle.mjs: Real next/link + next/navigation runtime code gets bundled (not just types), which reads many process.env.__NEXT_* flags the upstream narrow 'process.env.NODE_ENV' define never matches; browsers have no process global at all, so every unmatched read threw ReferenceError and broke every preview. Fork broadens the define to a full process shim; the bundle header/manifest contract is untouched.
